product: Databricks connector for Power BI now supports the ADBC driver (Public Preview)
tagline: You can set the Databricks connector for Power BI to use the Arrow Database Connectivity (ADBC) driver instead of the ODBC driver.
what_it_does: You can set the Databricks connector for Power BI to use the Arrow Database Connectivity (ADBC) driver instead of the ODBC driver. Preview This feature is in Public Preview. This page explains how to configure which driver your Power BI connections use.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: You can set the Databricks connector for Power BI to use the Arrow Database Connectivity (ADBC) driver instead of the ODBC driver. Preview This feature is in Public Preview.
key_takeaway: You can set the Databricks connector for Power BI to use the Arrow Database Connectivity (ADBC) driver instead of the ODBC driver.
